title: Episode 14 Question
wikitext:
[]: Episode 14 Question             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Tue Jan 22, 2013 1:10 am So I've been slowly rewatching NGE lately on the Platinum thinkpack, and I came upon Episode 14, aka the semi-recap episode. What stood out to me is that the subtitles for the title cards actually used the names for the Angels, such as Sachiel and Gaghiel. I was pretty certain the official names were never actually used like this, so this stood out to me to see them on screen. Is this a liberty taken by whoever did the translation? Or does the Japanese literally say "Sachiel" and whatnot?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 22, 2013 1:20 am The Japanese literally says "Sachiel". It's just romanized: サキエル Going to the List of Angels in the wiki and clicking on the individual Angel pages shows the official romanization.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Jan 22, 2013 1:27 am Yeah, that is actually what the Japanese text says. The Angels' names are written using katakana, so you can directly write them using the Latin alphabet, e.g. サキエル (Sakieru) becomes "Sachiel". So the show gives the names for the Angels up to and including Sahaquiel. My question is: Where did we get the official names for the last seven Angels?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 22, 2013 2:46 am riffraff11235 wrote: My question is: Where did we get the official names for the last seven Angels?

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Jan 22, 2013 5:36 am Ornette wrote: From the Death and Rebirth deluxe theatrical program

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Tue Jan 22, 2013 6:40 am Monk Ed wrote: What I wonder is, does NemZ think that the last seven Angels should be considered to have no official names at all because their names do not appear in the show itself?

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Fri Jan 25, 2013 12:51 am Monk Ed wrote: What I wonder is, does NemZ think that the last seven Angels should be considered to have no official names at all because their names do not appear in the show itself?

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Fri Jan 25, 2013 10:56 am no that approach only happens with how to actually explain plot points
